name: Oriental Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vegetable oil, sesame oil, and dried crushed red pepper in a bowl.
2. Place the vegetables on a sheet of perforated paper towel.
3. Fold the long sides of the paper towel toward the center, enclosing the food.
4. Fold both ends of the paper towel toward the center, overlapping the food.
5. Place the packet on a microwave-safe plate, with the perforated side up.
6. Pour chicken broth evenly over the packet.
7. Microwave on high for 5-7 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and crisp. Rotate the plate once during cooking.
8. Let stand for 2 minutes before opening the packet along the perforations.
9. Stir in enoki mushrooms and sprinkle with soy sauce.
